chosen_logo.why: Header at /themes/custom/mars_acss/assets/images/logo-main.svg, 138×40 — the canonical wordmark rendered on every page header. Confirmed visually in shot.png across about/, the-five-principles/, sustainability-plan/. Matches the SVG that JSON-LD Organization.logo also points to (id 3e6f38be / c9322a38).

brand_primary.name: mars-blue
brand_primary.evidence: :root --ssa-color-palette-mars-blue rgb(0,0,160); footer bg, h2/h3 colour, link colour across all pages

brand_secondary.name: mars-green
brand_secondary.evidence: :root --ssa-color-palette-mars-green rgb(0,215,185); used as accent on Five Principles tile (see shot.png)

ink.name: ink-grey
ink.evidence: :root --ssa-color-palette-dark-grey rgb(60,60,60); body color across every page

accents.name: petcare-red
accents.evidence: --ssa-color-palette-mars-petcare; Mars Petcare division (Pedigree, Whiskas, Royal Canin)

accents.name: food-green
accents.evidence: --ssa-color-palette-mars-food; Mars Food & Nutrition division (Ben's Original, Dolmio)

accents.name: snack-yellow
accents.evidence: --ssa-color-palette-mars-yellow; M&M's / Snickers signature yellow, also used on Five Principles tile

accents.name: edge-blue
accents.evidence: --ssa-color-palette-mars-edge; secondary cool-blue accent for science/innovation contexts

display_font.evidence: fonts.computed_heading + 33 hits in font_frequencies; preload links to MarsCentra-Extrabold.woff2; --ssa-font-stacks-marscentrano1-extrabold

spacing_radius_shadow.evidence: Every computed_palette surface (h1/h2/h3/button/cta/footer/header/nav across about, about-history, our-brands, sustainability-plan, news-and-stories) has radius:0px and shadow:none. Header padY 48px and CTA padX 15px / padY 13px imply confident comfortable spacing, not tight.

aesthetic.voice_register: warm corporate confidence — family-owned but multinational; speaks plainly about purpose (Five Principles), reliably positive but not chirpy

notes: Mars uses a fully documented internal design system (the 'ssa' token family) with a remarkable multi-color brand palette where each business segment (Petcare, Food, Wrigley, Snacking) carries its own signature hue, all anchored to mars-blue #0000A0. Unlike most corporate giants, Mars commits to bright primary colors with zero corner radius and zero shadow — the visual register is closer to Bauhaus posters or 1970s IBM brochures than to a modern SaaS site. Capture this with conviction.
